steps.title: Use the fitted line
steps.content: The question asks for the value predicted by the line of best fit, not the actual data point. At $x=32$, read vertically from the $x$-axis to the fitted line.

steps.title: Estimate the y-value
steps.content: On the graph, the fitted line is between $y=2$ and $y=3$ when $x=32$. The closest listed value in that interval is $2.4$. The answer is C.
